note: This is the availability our projections assume, reconciled from the official injury reports and our live feed — not injury news itself. “Questionable / day-to-day” players still carry a real play chance; “out” players have their minutes redistributed. A row marked “read from the latest report” is one where our read is fresher than the raw feed status. Minutes next to an absence are that player's season average — the size of the role left to fill, from our player board. “Likely to step up” is the same depth-chart promotion our status board's game card flags — the player moved up the rotation the absence opened.
empty_note: No players are currently listed out or questionable across the league — a clean bill of health is the normal, good state.
